Set: Custom Austin studio. Wooden walls, neon JRE sign. Cluttered table.
Camera: Multi-cam. Wide + individual medium shots across table.
Lighting: Full, even. Red velvet curtain behind guest.
Equipment: Large mics + headphones on both. Proudly a studio.
Wardrobe: Casual graphic tees. Guests wear anything.
Vibe: Masculine, casual hangout
Key elements: Neon sign, wooden walls, visible mics+headphones, cluttered table

Set: Dark, moody living room. Bookshelves with warm lamp lighting. Dark wooden desk/table.
Camera: Multi-cam. Host medium close-up. Guest tighter close-up, angled.
Lighting: Low-key, cinematic. Warm accents on bookshelves.
Equipment: No mics visible. No headphones. Clean intimate frame.
Wardrobe: Steven Bartlett: always black t-shirt.
Vibe: Intimate, premium, cinematic
Key elements: Dark background, bookshelf lamps, no visible equipment, black wardrobe

Set: Near-total darkness. No decoration. Just faces.
Camera: Tight close-ups. Shallow depth of field.
Lighting: Extremely low-key. Single key light. Most dramatic of all.
Equipment: Mic understated. Darkness hides everything.
Wardrobe: Black or intellectual graphic tees.
Vibe: Intense, philosophical, intimate
Key elements: Total darkness, single-source light, extreme close-ups
